_doc: Self-contained grounding golden set. No dependency on data/cache (gitignored) so it runs in CI from a clean checkout. Each case: a source span and a quote that MUST ground (grounded=true) or MUST be rejected (grounded=false). The regression gate also derives the catch-rate stress test from the grounded cases: it corrupts each clinically meaningful token in every grounded quote and asserts every corruption is rejected (catch rate) while the untouched quote still grounds (no false rejection). Synthetic oncology text only; no real patient data.

cases.source: Inclusion Criteria: Patients must have histologically confirmed Stage IV non-small cell lung cancer. ECOG performance status 0 to 1. Adequate organ function. Exclusion Criteria: Active brain metastases. Prior immunotherapy.
cases.quote: histologically confirmed Stage IV non-small cell lung cancer

cases.source: Inclusion Criteria: Patients must have histologically confirmed Stage IV non-small cell lung cancer. ECOG performance status 0 to 1. Adequate organ function.
Eligible subjects have measurable disease per RECIST 1.1 and adequate bone marrow function defined as ANC greater than 1500.
Patients with HER2-positive metastatic breast cancer who have received at least one prior line of anti-HER2 therapy are eligible.
Documented EGFR exon 19 deletion or exon 21 L858R mutation is required for enrollment on this arm.
58-year-old woman with triple-negative breast cancer, ECOG 1, no prior chemotherapy in the metastatic setting.
48 M with EF was 25% and T-L spine involvement documented on imaging per the tumor board note.
48 M with EF was 25% and T-L spine involvement documented on imaging per the tumor board note.
Prior treatment with an immune checkpoint inhibitor within 6 months is an exclusion criterion for this study.
Subjects must have castration-resistant prostate cancer with rising PSA on two consecutive measurements.
Creatinine clearance must be at least 60 mL/min calculated by the Cockcroft-Gault formula at screening.
cases.quote: Creatinine clearance must be at least 60 mL/min

cases.source: Patients with active, untreated central nervous system metastases are excluded from participation.
cases.quote: active, untreated central nervous system metastases

cases.source: Histologically or cytologically confirmed diagnosis of pancreatic adenocarcinoma that is locally advanced or metastatic.
Life expectancy of at least 12 weeks as judged by the treating investigator is required.
cases.quote: Life expectancy of at least 12 weeks

cases.source: Patients must not have received any prior systemic therapy for advanced or metastatic disease.
cases.quote: no prior systemic therapy for advanced or metastatic disease

cases.source: Inclusion Criteria: Patients must have histologically confirmed Stage IV non-small cell lung cancer. ECOG performance status 0 to 1.
cases.quote: documented EGFR exon 19 deletion present in tumor tissue

cases.source: Subjects must have castration-resistant prostate cancer with rising PSA on two consecutive measurements.
Eligible subjects have measurable disease per RECIST 1.1 and adequate bone marrow function.
Patients with HER2-positive metastatic breast cancer are eligible for cohort A.
Creatinine clearance must be at least 60 mL/min calculated by the Cockcroft-Gault formula.
